summary: The benchmark now has a distinct runtime-generated RV-002 family showing that an external human-facing signal can reopen the work into clarification even without an approval-veto branch, increasing human disconfirmation source diversity beyond the escalation-only path.
notes: This verdict extends RV-002 source diversity by separating external-signal disconfirmation from the escalation-reopen branch.
The remaining gap is broader artifact diversity: additional runtime-generated human disconfirmation families should come from more than one artifact type, not only more than one reopen source.
